subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted to the Heavenly Kingdom! O ye who are enlightened by the light of guidance! O ye lamps lighted by the light of love and faithfulness!
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @angels, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant
